description: Create a 5-slide executive briefing presentation summarizing a SEV-1 network outage using the incident notes at ~/Documents/Presentations/incident_notes.txt and the architecture diagram at ~/Documents/Presentations/us_east_architecture.png. The presentation must include: a title slide referencing 'SEV-1' and 'US-East'; an executive summary of the impact and downtime; a timeline of events with UTC timestamps; a root cause analysis including the architecture diagram; and a list of remediation action items with the specific Jira ticket IDs found in the notes. Save the presentation to ~/Documents/Presentations/sev1_postmortem.pptx.
